metadata.referenceDocument: Boeing 787 AFM Rev. 20 'MAXIMUM CROSS WIND FOR LANDING' table + Landing (2).xlsx 'Data' sheet (curator)
metadata.notes: Landing crosswind base lookup + FCOM CAUTION adjustments. Taxonomy v2 per ADR-0018: 'good' split into 'goodWetDamp' and 'goodSlushSnow'; 'mediumToGood' renamed to 'goodToMedium'. catIIIIICap and asymReversePenalty shared across both aircraft; engineInopAutolandLimit is per-aircraft (B787-8 = 28 KT).

metadata.referenceDocument: Boeing 787 AFM Rev. 20 'MAXIMUM CROSS WIND FOR LANDING' table + Landing (2).xlsx 'Data' sheet (curator)
metadata.notes: Landing crosswind for B787-9, taxonomy v2 per ADR-0018. engineInopAutolandLimit=37 is per FCOM but operationally non-binding — all baseTable values for B787-9 are <=28, so the 37 cap never restricts results. Kept literal per FCOM.
